user.title: Connect to OpenRouter
user.description: Enter your OpenRouter API key to enable Gemini TTS with Matilda's voice. Get your key at [{api_key_url}]({api_key_url}).

reauth_confirm.title: Update API Key
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a new OpenRouter API key. Get your key at [{api_key_url}]({api_key_url}).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to OpenRouter. Check your API key.

init.title: Configure Gemini TTS Matilda (OpenRouter)
init.description: Leave API Key empty to keep the current one, or enter a new one.

data.api_key: API Key (leave empty to keep current)
